name: Goblin Marauding Squad
name_jp: ゴブリン<ruby lang="jp"><rb>切</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>り<ruby lang="jp"><rb>込</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>み<ruby lang="jp"><rb>部</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぶ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>隊</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>たい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When this card declares an attack, your opponent cannot activate cards or effects. If this card attacks, it is changed to Defense Position at the end of the Battle Phase, and its battle position cannot be changed until the End Phase of your next turn.
mnst_eff: When this card declares an attack, your opponent cannot activate cards or effects. If this card attacks, it is changed to Defense Position at the end of the Battle Phase, and its battle position cannot be changed until the End Phase of your next turn.
eff: When this card declares an attack, your opponent cannot activate cards or effects. If this card attacks, it is changed to Defense Position at the end of the Battle Phase, and its battle position cannot be changed until the End Phase of your next turn.

mst: Prevents activation of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Prevents activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
Prevents activation of your opponent's Trap Cards
